mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board ( user_id, board_code, category_id, title, content, view_count, like_count, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{boardCode}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT b.post_id AS postId, b.category_id AS categoryId, c.category_name AS categoryName, b.title, b.content, b.view_count AS viewCount, b.like_count AS likeCount, b.created_at AS createdAt, b.updated_at AS updatedAt, u.nickname, COUNT(cm.comment_id) AS commentCount FROM board b JOIN users u ON b.user_id = u.id JOIN category c ON b.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN comments cm ON b.post_id = cm.post_id AND cm.is_deleted = FALSE WHERE b.is_deleted = FALSE AND b.board_code = #{boardCode} GROUP BY b.post_id, b.category_id, c.category_name, b.title, b.content, b.view_count, b.like_count, b.created_at, b.updated_at, u.nickname ORDER BY b.created_at DESC

SELECT b.post_id AS postId, b.category_id AS categoryId, c.category_name AS categoryName, b.title, b.content, b.view_count AS viewCount, b.like_count AS likeCount, b.created_at AS createdAt, b.updated_at AS updatedAt, u.nickname, u.id AS userId FROM board b JOIN users u ON b.user_id = u.id LEFT OUTER JOIN category c ON b.category_id = c.category_id WHERE b.post_id = #{postId}
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET is_deleted = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE board SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category_id = #{categoryId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT b.post_id AS postId, b.board_code AS boardCode, u.nickname, c.category_name AS categoryName, b.title, b.content, b.view_count AS viewCount, b.like_count AS likeCount, b.created_at AS createdAt, b.updated_at AS updatedAt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMENTS c WHERE b.post_Id = c.post_id AND c.is_deleted = false) AS commentCount FROM board b JOIN category c ON b.category_id = c.category_id JOIN users u on b.user_id = u.id WHERE b.board_code = #{boardCode} ORDER BY b.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT post_id, title, content, board_code FROM board WHERE is_deleted = false

SELECT b.post_id , b.title , b.content , b.board_code , b.view_count , b.like_count , b.created_at , u.nickname , c.category_name FROM board b JOIN users u ON b.user_id = u.id JOIN category c ON b.category_id = c.category_id
WHERE b.post_id IN
#{id}
WHERE FALSE
